description: Visualize the scope of TreeGrafter GO:0080043 over-propagation error
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create a visualization showing the scope of the TreeGrafter propagation error
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 6))
fig.suptitle('Scope of TreeGrafter GO:0080043 Over-Propagation', 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Panel A: IEA vs Experimental annotations
ax1 = axes[0]
categories = ['Experimental\n(IDA/IMP/IGI)', 'Automated\n(IEA/IBA)']
counts = [23, 28355]
colors = ['#4CAF50', '#F44336']
bars = ax1.bar(categories, counts, color=colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, width=0.6)
ax1.set_ylabel('Number of Annotations', fontsize=12)
ax1.set_title('A. GO:0080043 Annotation Sources\n(global)', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_yscale('log')
ax1.set_ylim(1, 100000)

for bar, val in zip(bars, counts):
    ax1.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, val * 1.3, f'{val:,}', 
             ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

ax1.annotate(f'1,233x\nmore automated\nthan experimental', 
             xy=(1, 5000), fontsize=11, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='red'))

# Panel B: Nicotiana UGT families receiving GO:0080043 from TreeGrafter
ax2 = axes[1]
# From the search results, TreeGrafter assigned GO:0080043 to many different UGT families
nicotiana_families = {
    'UGT85A': 4,
    'UGT75B': 2,
    'UGT86A': 2,
    'UGT74E/F': 3,
    'UGT83A': 3,
    'UGT82A': 1,
    'UGT76C': 1,
    'Others': 9,
}

fam_names = list(nicotiana_families.keys())
fam_counts = list(nicotiana_families.values())
fam_colors = ['#FF9800'] * len(fam_names)

bars2 = ax2.bar(range(len(fam_names)), fam_counts, color=fam_colors, 
                edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.set_xticks(range(len(fam_names)))
ax2.set_xticklabels(fam_names, fontsize=9, rotation=45, ha='right')
ax2.set_ylabel('# Proteins Annotated', fontsize=11)
ax2.set_title(f'B. Nicotiana UGT Families Receiving\nGO:0080043 from TreeGrafter\n(237 total, 0 experimental)', 
              fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

ax2.annotate('ALL are automated (IEA)\nNONE have experimental evidence', 
             xy=(3.5, max(fam_counts) * 0.85), fontsize=10, ha='center', 
             color='red', fontweight='bold',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='red'))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('propagation_error_scope.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: propagation_error_scope.png")
